sourceInputs.situation_assessment: We are at the starter shelter anchor with repeated placement-rejection history and no open social request. The active focus is narrowly to test exactly one explicit neighboring placement cell that is most likely valid, then stop if it is rejected and record the exact support/collision/invalid-cell reason. Visible Action Cards are insufficient for this because Place Block requires a concrete placeable inventory item and explicit placement coordinates, while current_state only confirms sticks in inventory and does not provide a placeable block item to test with. Observe is also insufficient because the episode already has enough context; the blocker is not world ignorance in general, but the need for a bounded, single-cell placement validity check at the known anchor.
sourceInputs.why_codegen_is_needed: No visible Action Card can express a single-cell shelter-placement validity probe that reports the exact blocker reason without broadening into generic observe/gather. We need a bounded Mineflayer helper that examines one chosen neighboring candidate around the starter shelter anchor, checks occupancy/support/collision conditions in loaded world state, and returns a precise blocker artifact or confirmation of validity for that one cell only.
sourceInputs.desired_minecraft_behavior: Author a bounded helper that probes exactly one candidate neighboring placement cell adjacent to the starter shelter anchor (prefer the most plausible shell extension cell near the known anchor at (7,76,5)). The helper should compute or inspect the target cell, determine whether it is empty/replaceable, whether the support/reference block is valid, and whether any collision or adjacency rule blocks placement. It must return a concise result naming the tested cell and the exact rejection reason if invalid, or confirm that the cell is valid for placement. Do not broaden into general scanning, gathering, or multi-cell exploration. Keep the probe limited to one cell and one reason artifact.
sourceInputs.failure_handling: If the helper cannot determine validity from loaded world state alone, return a specific blocker such as insufficient loaded evidence for the chosen cell rather than expanding the search. Do not retry multiple cells in the same turn.
